info.title: Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage Native API
info.description: Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage Native API enables uploading, downloading, and managing files and buckets in B2 Cloud Storage. Supports application key management, lifecycle rules, file operations, and large file uploads.

get.summary: Authorize account and get API URL
get.description: Authenticate with application key ID and key. Returns the API URL, download URL, and authorization token for subsequent requests.

post.description: List all buckets in the account or filter by bucket ID/name
Get a URL and token for uploading files to a bucket

post.summary: List file names in a bucket
post.description: List file names in a bucket
Hide a file so it doesn't appear in b2_list_file_names

post.summary: List parts of a large file
post.description: List parts of a large file

basicAuth.description: Application Key ID as username, Application Key as password (for b2_authorize_account only)
